rollback_plan: Stop before any service/timer work; no service/timer changes are planned.
Copy live DB to timestamped backup before schema apply.
Apply canonical SQL inside one sqlite transaction if possible.
Run integrity_check, quick_check and foreign_key_check after apply.
If postcheck fails, restore DB from backup copy.
Do not mutate active 8096 panel, Nginx/Auth/hosts, service/timer, paper/live/watchlist/score.

hard_rules: No live DB mutation in PHASE5F.
Real schema apply requires exact explicit approval phrase.
Backup must be created before live DB schema apply.
Rollback script must be created in real apply phase.
Post-apply integrity, quick and FK checks are mandatory.
Skipped indexes and canonical conflict must be acknowledged before live apply.

target_tables.create_sql_preview:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cascading_execution_filter_eval_events_v1 (
  eval_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  event_ts_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
  token_uid TEXT,
  pair_uid TEXT,
  chain TEXT NOT NULL,
  route_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  current_stage_no INTEGER NOT NULL,
  current_stage_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  stage_result TEXT NOT NULL,
  stop_reason TEXT,
  rpc_calls_used INTEGER NOT NULL,
  eth_call_used INTEGER NOT NULL,
  router_quote_used INTEGER NOT NULL,
  execution_permission TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
